overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of an elevated pedestrian walkway in a futuristic cyberpunk city, likely from Cyberpunk 2077. The player ascends stairs and walks along a green-metal enclosed bridge with views of busy streets, neon signage, and dense urban architecture below. The scene features mixed natural and artificial neon lighting with various NPC pedestrians and digital advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairwell transition from lower to upper concourse

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters the elevated pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: walking up red metal stairs from lower level toward the elevated walkway

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement for burger restaurant on the left wall
wide red metal stairs with green side walls leading upward
industrial green painted metal ceiling with exposed beams

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the bottom of a red metal staircase in an enclosed concrete stairwell. The camera ascends the stairs, passing a large burger advertisement on the left wall, and transitions into a green-metal elevated pedestrian walkway at the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian overpass with city views

events.description: transitions from stair climbing to level walking along the pedestrian bridge
cityscape becomes visible through large openings on the right side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered pedestrian bridge, passing various NPCs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and hat walking toward camera

entered.detail: long covered corridor with green painted metal walls and floor panels
large screen displaying advertisement with woman's face
large rectangular openings in the wall revealing the city street below
red automated vending machine with illuminated display

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated pedestrian walkway with green metal interior architecture. The right side features large openings offering glimpses of the futuristic cityscape below. Various pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and digital billboards line the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated observation deck over busy highway

events.description: full view of the multi-level highway and traffic becomes visible through the overlook
vehicles moving on the highway below including cars and trucks

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the overlook, glancing at the traffic and buildings below

entered.detail: expansive view of multi-level highway with moving traffic and futuristic skyscrapers
tall buildings with neon signage and stacked architectural platforms
decorative pink flowering trees lining the street below
large red signage with 'Kabayan' text visible on distant building

segments.scene_description: The walkway opens up to reveal a stunning view of a busy multi-level highway with moderate traffic flow. Futuristic skyscrapers with neon accents rise in the background, and pink cherry blossom trees line the streets below. The camera moves slowly along the glass railing, observing the urban landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with vending machines and neon lighting

events.description: passing rows of red vending machines with illuminated displays

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway past vending machines and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person standing at vending machine making a purchase

entered.detail: row of red automated vending machines with glowing screens
structural columns with pink and blue neon lighting
green metal seating benches along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The walkway becomes more enclosed again, passing rows of red vending machines and green benches. Neon-lit pillars provide colorful illumination. The view of the highway is replaced by solid walls with occasional windows, though the Kabayan sign remains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian bridge end with intersection overlook

events.description: approaching the end of the walkway with view of street intersection and Kabayan sign
slight turn to the right while continuing to walk, revealing more of the intersection below

agents.ego_description: walking toward the end of the pedestrian bridge, observing the intersection and surrounding architecture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead of camera

entered.detail: street-level intersection with crosswalks and moving vehicles visible below
white and gray high-rise buildings surrounding the intersection

segments.scene_description: The final section of the walkway opens up to reveal a street intersection below with the prominent Kabayan sign overhead. White office buildings surround the intersection, and sparse traffic moves along the roads. The camera continues walking toward this overlook point, passing other pedestrians in the moderately busy corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a confined concrete stairwell into a sprawling, neon-lit futuristic cityscape. It begins at the base of a red metal staircase, climbing past a large burger advertisement before transitioning into a green-metal elevated pedestrian walkway. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed space opens up to reveal glimpses of the urban environment through large side openings, passing by digital billboards and pedestrians moving in opposing directions. The scene then expands fully as the walkway reaches a glass railing, shifting the focus toward a vast vista of multi-level highways and neon-accented skyscrapers. Finally, the perspective lingers on the dense architecture and pink cherry blossom trees lining the streets far below.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a confined pedestrian corridor that gradually opens into a wide urban overlook. It begins as the walkway becomes more enclosed, passing rows of red vending machines and green benches illuminated by colorful neon pillars. As the camera moves forward, the view of the highway is replaced by solid walls with occasional windows, though a distant Kabayan sign remains a focal point. The scene then expands as the walkway opens up to reveal a street intersection below, surrounded by white office buildings and sparse traffic. Finally, the camera continues past other pedestrians in the busy corridor toward the overlook point directly beneath the prominent overhead signage.
